title: Bets Cant sleep
wikitext:
[]: Bets / Can't sleep             Quote Post by Big Panda » Tue Apr 24, 2007 11:56 pm Well, as the topic says, this is about bets... and it exists because I have nothing better to do now. Its 2 am in Brazil now and I got a cold, forgive this random lameness.... i'm just BORED. Back to topic, what would you bet that is gonna happen in those movies? Worthless things only. First: SSAT -> Ipod. .... yeah... ... Damn, this topic is pretty lame.... I should get a girlfriend...

[]:             Quote Post by Shawn Dudley » Wed Apr 25, 2007 12:57 am It's not a lame topic, we do this all the time around the house... I say the SDAT stays! It's so classic! Also, PenPen gets a new backpack thingy! Misato will have the same car...and will still have the fridge full of Yeribsu (with the hampster on the front) Any other stupid guesses...

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Apr 25, 2007 1:00 am there will be fanservice. Both of the Misato's cleavage variety, and the disappearing cigarette variety.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 25, 2007 2:02 am - The harpies will fuck off. The "new machine" will be an EVA-05 that actually looks like an Eva. - Pen^2 will speak Pidgin Japanese. - Kaworu will be a boyish-looking girl.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Apr 25, 2007 2:05 am Reichu wrote: - The harpies will fuck off. The "new machine" will be an EVA-05 that actually looks like an Eva. - Pen^2 will speak Pidgin Japanese. - Kaworu will be a boyish-looking girl.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Wed Apr 25, 2007 3:11 pm I bet it will have Shinji. Worthless things only, right?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Apr 25, 2007 3:58 pm Lots of Asuka X Shinji shipping.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Apr 25, 2007 4:19 pm I bet it will be overrated. Although it is quite certain I will rave about it and contribute to its overratedness.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Apr 25, 2007 4:43 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Lots of Asuka X Shinji shipping.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Wed Apr 25, 2007 5:06 pm We won't get a torrent until December

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Apr 25, 2007 5:52 pm I bet one of the new characters will be a pilot and as well as what Reichu said regarding the "new machine". It will not totally suck. But it will not be the greatest. And what Brik-kun said (Though I will not contribute to its overrated rep, I cannot make the same Sherman-esque pledge about contributing to Anno-kun and crew's banking statement in exchange for assorted merchandise ).

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Wed Apr 25, 2007 6:31 pm fadingreminder wrote: I bet it will have Shinji. Worthless things only, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Wed Apr 25, 2007 6:41 pm Rei will talk more?

[]:             Quote Post by sensei_juice » Wed Apr 25, 2007 7:35 pm SSAT stays. PenPen continues to show up and stare whenever Shinji is having an awkward moment. THE PENGUIN KNOWS. Kaworu says "Jesus Christ" a lot. That was evil, but worth it.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Apr 25, 2007 7:40 pm Misato's USP will be swapped for a Desert Eagle. Kaji will pack a Walther PPK. Gendo's CZ 75B will become a Luger P08.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Apr 25, 2007 8:18 pm I doubt that Anno would do something silly or loony-toony as to put in a Desert Eagle for Misato's sidearm. The most cartoonish it could get is something like a .44 magnum or S&W 500. Or maybe a Trek-esque phaser-like weapon. And then some sort of line from something from Dirty Harry or Star Trek, in reference to said sidearm, thrown in for comic relief. I could see something like a Metal Storm-esque weapon though.

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Wed Apr 25, 2007 8:34 pm Rei will be mine! All mine!!! Muhahahahahaha.... .... .... Yeah, Rei will talk more... :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Apr 25, 2007 9:49 pm SHINJI- His evolution as a character will be from spineless coward to decent human being. No real sharp decline into pure fuckuperry as in the final third of Eva and EOE REI- While she won't be a chatter box she will open up more. Definitly more smiling and occasionally a blush here and there. By the climax she'll be well on her way to being almost normal. I'm also thinking while she'll remain an integral part of Gendo's plans (might even sacrifice herself in cliche ending to save the world), I think the Yui-DNA might be dropped so the Shinji-Rei loving can be less...Freudian. ASUKA- Still a bitch. Hers is the character I'm worried about the most. She's introduced in Part 2 of a 3 part series (the whole 0.3 + FINAL are bullshit until both are at least 90 minutes- for me its a new Eva Trilogy so far) and if her character isn't given a total rewrite or they find some incredibly emotional scene that lays her whole psyche out on the line she might not have the screentime available to grow. Asuka is a character that can easily be messed up in the writing department. Go to far one way and she's an obnoxious (hate to say it) bitch. Go to far the other way and she's a lame "I love Shinji" character. P.S. Her inflatable boobs will be even more bipolar in their size. Changing in the middle of scenes at time even. KAWORU- Still obnoxious. JUst more screentime. I don't care how much they rewrite the character, he's still gonna be the cliche anime effeminate male character. It seems every anime has a Kaworu stereotype. I guess in Japan albinism means GAY/EFFEMINITE. TOJI- Still badass. Still not getting the respect his character deserves in place of Kaworu (Toji is the kindest and most sincere Eva character in my eyes- I mean he's friends with the kid who put his sister in the hospital, no matter what Shinji is that takes a huge heart for a 14 year old to forgive). If the 13th Angel bit happens he'll die like in the manga. He might get a little Hiakri action. KENSUKE- As secondary a character as they come this time around. Probably just nerdy and full of comedic one-liners. HIKARI- Cuter than ever. 'Nuff said. NEW CHARACTER- Hottie foreign pilot with glasses! It's a must!!! It's not gonna be a guy cause those don't sell enought merchandise. ----------------ADULTS------------ MISATO- Compared to her anime series she's gonna get the shaft (not that shaft perverts). I think the adults in general are gonna get the short shift this time around. Mostly we'll get hints of the complexities of the old Misato but those won't be as prominent as before. Only thing they'll up the ante with her is fanservice. RITSUKO- Nobody loves my Ritsu. She'll be around. Maybe still doing the nasty with Gendo. GENDO- Still Gendo. Unless Anno pulls a 180 and makes Gendo act like Anno is now. Happily married???? KAJI- Is Kaji even in this? He'll get some Misato, we might even know who kills him if he dies again. Or he'll live and father little bastard Kajisatos. FUYUTSUKI- I see his character being stripped of all complexity. THE TECHIES: MAYA- More pronounced lesbianism. HYUGA- More pronounced Hyugaism. AOBA- More of an teritary character than ever before! And ME: With a happy smile on my face either way.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Apr 25, 2007 10:03 pm Yeah, what you said.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Apr 25, 2007 10:23 pm Speculation: could the "new pilot and machine"....be Unit 04? That is, actually have an extended sequence at NERV-2 before 04 blows up? No that doesn't make sense. Still I hope we actually see Unit 04 ON SCREEN for 30 seconds or something. I hope they don't do Girlfriend of Steel on us. Her inflatable boobs will be even more bipolar in their size. Changing in the middle of scenes at time even.
